docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF DEFT RE CHANGE OF ADDRESS. FILED BY DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF SPIVOCK, MUNROE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY SPIVOCK, MUNROE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPIVOCK, MUNROE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS BASED ON THE REPRESENTATION THAT PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN CREDITED FOR PREVIOUS OVERAGE CHARGES, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFERED NO ADDITIONAL DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SPIVOCK, MUNROE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SPIVOCK, MUNROE AS TO DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPIVOCK, MUNROE AS TO DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPIVOCK, MUNROE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $63.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $563.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS HEARING SET FOR JAN-29-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-02-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY VERIZON WIRELESS IS GRANTED.
